verses.text: Bezaleel and all the wise-hearted work with the offerings the people bring. The work begins. Willing gifts fund the work.
Bezaleel and all the wise-hearted work with the offerings the people bring. The work begins. Willing gifts fund the work.
Bezaleel and all the wise-hearted work with the offerings the people bring. The work begins. Willing gifts fund the work.
The people bring so much that Moses restrains them; 'the stuff... was too much.' Overflow. Generosity exceeds the need.
The people bring so much that Moses restrains them; 'the stuff... was too much.' Overflow. Generosity exceeds the need.
The people bring so much that Moses restrains them; 'the stuff... was too much.' Overflow. Generosity exceeds the need.
The people bring so much that Moses restrains them; 'the stuff... was too much.' Overflow. Generosity exceeds the need.
The curtains of fine twined linen with cherubims are made. The curtains. The tent takes shape.
The curtains of fine twined linen with cherubims are made. The curtains. The tent takes shape.
They are coupled with loops and taches of gold into one. Joined. The whole becomes one tabernacle.
They are coupled with loops and taches of gold into one. Joined. The whole becomes one tabernacle.
They are coupled with loops and taches of gold into one. Joined. The whole becomes one tabernacle.
They are coupled with loops and taches of gold into one. Joined. The whole becomes one tabernacle.
Eleven curtains of goats' hair are made for a tent over it. The covering. A second layer shields the holy place.
Eleven curtains of goats' hair are made for a tent over it. The covering. A second layer shields the holy place.
Eleven curtains of goats' hair are made for a tent over it. The covering. A second layer shields the holy place.
Taches and coverings of skins complete the tent. Covered. The sanctuary is overspread.
Taches and coverings of skins complete the tent. Covered. The sanctuary is overspread.
Taches and coverings of skins complete the tent. Covered. The sanctuary is overspread.
Boards of shittim wood are made, standing upright. The boards. The frame is set up.
Boards of shittim wood are made, standing upright. The boards. The frame is set up.
Boards of shittim wood are made, standing upright. The boards. The frame is set up.
Boards of shittim wood are made, standing upright. The boards. The frame is set up.
Sockets of silver and boards for the sides are made. The sides. The walls enclose the holy place.
Sockets of silver and boards for the sides are made. The sides. The walls enclose the holy place.
Sockets of silver and boards for the sides are made. The sides. The walls enclose the holy place.
Sockets of silver and boards for the sides are made. The sides. The walls enclose the holy place.
Corner boards strengthen the back, with their sockets. Corners. The structure is braced.
Corner boards strengthen the back, with their sockets. Corners. The structure is braced.
Corner boards strengthen the back, with their sockets. Corners. The structure is braced.
Bars overlaid with gold hold the boards together. Bars. The structure is bound firm.
Bars overlaid with gold hold the boards together. Bars. The structure is bound firm.
Bars overlaid with gold hold the boards together. Bars. The structure is bound firm.
Bars overlaid with gold hold the boards together. Bars. The structure is bound firm.
The veil and the hanging for the door are made. The veil. The holy is set apart within.
The veil and the hanging for the door are made. The veil. The holy is set apart within.
